# ModelRouter-App Disclaimer and End User Agreement

> Other languages: [中文](LEGAL.md) | [日本語](LEGAL.ja.md)

## Important Notice

ModelRouter-App is an experimental research project created and open-sourced by an individual developer. This project is provided "as is" for the purpose of providing source code for learning and research. The author expressly disclaims all warranties and has not deployed enterprise-grade security measures. By using this software, you acknowledge and accept all risks, agree to comply with the following terms, and accept full responsibility.

---

## 1. Nature of Project and No Warranty

### 1.1

This software is a personal experimental research project. All source code is open-sourced under the Apache-2.0 license, primarily for technical learning and research reference. It is not a commercial-grade, production-ready software or service.

### 1.2

This software is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis. The developer and contributors expressly disclaim all express or implied warranties, including but not limited to warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, non-infringement, security, stability, timeliness, and freedom from errors.

---

## 2. Deployment, Network Security, and Limitation of Liability

### 2.1 Strict Deployment Restrictions

Given the experimental nature of this project, users must not expose any service ports involved in this project (including but not limited to API ports and management interface ports) to the public Internet or any network environment with security risks (such as untrusted local area networks). Users should run this project only in controlled, isolated secure internal networks or localhost environments for research purposes.

### 2.2 Security Risks at Your Own Risk

Any consequences and related legal liability arising from user violations of the above deployment restrictions, or from the project's lack of comprehensive security measures—including system intrusion, data breaches, service interruptions, asset loss, or other security incidents—shall be borne solely by the user. The developer has provided clear warnings regarding such risks and assumes no liability.

---

## 3. Limited Protection of Data and Privacy

### 3.1

As an experimental project, this software has not implemented comprehensive protection for data security and personal privacy. Although some code may include basic design, there is no guarantee of confidentiality, integrity, or availability of API keys, configuration information, or data in transit.

### 3.2

Users are fully responsible for the legality, security, and confidentiality of all data processed through this software. Any consequences arising from data breaches, corruption, loss, or violations of privacy regulations shall be borne solely by the user.

---

## 4. Third-Party Services and Compliance

### 4.1

This software is an intermediary tool for invoking third-party AI services. Users must ensure that their use (including purpose, call frequency, request content, etc.) fully complies with all agreements and policies of the connected AI service providers (such as OpenAI, Alibaba Cloud, etc.).

### 4.2

The developer cannot know or control the user's purpose of use. Users agree not to use this software for any illegal, infringing, or destructive activities. Any disputes and liability arising from violations of this agreement or third-party terms shall be resolved and borne solely by the user.

---

## 5. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, the developer and all contributors shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, punitive, or consequential damages (including loss of profits, data loss, business interruption, or other economic losses) arising from the use or inability to use this software, whether based on any legal theory (such as contract, tort, or negligence), even if advised of the possibility of such damages.

---

## 6. Acceptance of Agreement

Downloading, copying, installing, running, or using this software in any other manner constitutes your full reading, understanding, and unconditional acceptance of all terms of this agreement. If you do not agree with any part of this agreement, you must immediately cease use and destroy all copies of this software.
